Refer urgently to ED/ICU for ongoing management and monitoring.

acceptable_variants.description: Includes early referral/activation of emergency response while still completing required outcome actions.
steps: Communicate DKA is a medical emergency requiring ED/ICU care.
Record diagnosis: diabetic ketoacidosis with dehydration.
Prescribe IV fluids and IV insulin per protocol (with safety checks and monitoring caveats).
Refer to Emergency Medicine/ICU for immediate transfer and continuous monitoring.

acceptable_variants.description: Adds clinically appropriate supportive measures without deviating from required core therapies.
steps: Record diagnosis: DKA with dehydration and suspected precipitating factor (e.g., infection) if supported.
Prescribe IV fluids and IV insulin; mention electrolyte replacement (especially potassium) and dextrose addition when glucose falls, as part of protocol-based care.
Refer to ED/ICU for protocolized management and monitoring.
